title: No var declarations
guideline: Use const (or let when reassignment is required); var is forbidden.

rule.message: var is forbidden; use const or let

title: Use strict equality
guideline: Always compare with === / !==; loose equality coerces types.

title: No console.* in application code
guideline: Use the shared logger module instead of console.*.

rule.message: console.* is forbidden; use the logger module

title: Express route handler shape
guideline: Route handlers are async, delegate to a service, and forward errors to next().
